name: Lifestyle Influencer
description: Millennial influencer curating aspirational lifestyle content
context: Lifestyle Influencer is a Millennial who shares curated content about fashion, travel, wellness, and lifestyle. They value aesthetics, experiences, and authentic brand partnerships.

alwaysAsks: Is this authentic to my brand?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through lifestyle-curation lens. Needs aesthetic alignment and authentic fit.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on aesthetic quality, brand alignment, community fit, and authenticity.
